steps.summary: Curso demo con un paquete eXeLearning almacenado en el banco de contenidos del sistema.

steps.comment: Upload a sample eXeLearning package into the system content bank via the content bank API, which triggers contenttype_exelearning upload + extraction. runPhpCode = raw PHP CLI, so require config.php first.
steps.code: define('CLI_SCRIPT', true); foreach (['/www/moodle/config.php', getcwd().'/config.php', '/var/www/html/config.php'] as $c) { if (is_file($c)) { require($c); break; } } global $CFG, $DB, $USER; require_once($CFG->libdir.'/filelib.php'); require_once($CFG->dirroot.'/contentbank/contenttype/exelearning/lib.php'); $admin = get_admin(); $USER = $admin; $context = context_system::instance(); if (!$DB->record_exists('contentbank_content', ['contextid' => $context->id, 'contenttype' => 'contenttype_exelearning'])) { $tmp = make_request_directory().'/sample.elpx'; download_file_content('https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ateeducacion/moodle-contenttype_exelearning/main/tests/fixtures/sample.elpx', null, null, false, 300, 20, false, $tmp); $fs = get_file_storage(); $filerecord = ['contextid' => $context->id, 'component' => 'user', 'filearea' => 'draft', 'itemid' => file_get_unused_draft_itemid(), 'filepath' => '/', 'filename' => 'sample.elpx']; $stored = $fs->create_file_from_pathname($filerecord, $tmp); $cb = new \core_contentbank\contentbank(); $content = $cb->create_content_from_file($context, $admin->id, $stored); echo 'contentbank id='.$content->get_id()."\n"; }
